Mediation of cookstove → phlegm by FEV
```{r}
library(logistf)
library(boot)
library(parallel)

# Detect available cores, leave one for system
n_cores <- parallel::detectCores() - 1

# Define confounders and exposure
confounders <- c("Electricity", "focus_group", "indoor_outdoor_kitchen")
exposure    <- "Type"

# Subset to complete cases for required variables
all_vars <- c("phlegm_binary", exposure,
              "FVC_ratio_bin", "FEV1_ratio_bin", "PEF_ratio_bin",
              confounders)
df_cc <- df2[complete.cases(df2[, all_vars]), ]

# Unified function for a single mediator
boot_mediation_effects <- function(mediator_name, outcome_name = "phlegm_binary") {
  # 1. ACME (Indirect)
  boot_acme <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    beta_tm <- coef(
      lm(as.formula(paste(mediator_name, "~ Type +", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))), data = d)
    )["TypeImproved"]
    fit_y <- logistf(
      formula = as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~ Type +", mediator_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data    = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    beta_my <- fit_y$coefficients[mediator_name]
    beta_tm * beta_my
  }
  # 2. ADE (Direct)
  boot_ade <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    fit_y <- logistf(
      formula = as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~ Type +", mediator_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data    = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    fit_y$coefficients["TypeImproved"]
  }
  # 3. Total Effect
  boot_total <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    fit_y <- logistf(
      formula = as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~ Type +", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data    = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    fit_y$coefficients["TypeImproved"]
  }
  set.seed(2025)
  # Bootstrap with parallel computing
  boot_acme_obj  <- boot(df_cc, boot_acme,  R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  boot_ade_obj   <- boot(df_cc, boot_ade,   R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  boot_total_obj <- boot(df_cc, boot_total, R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  # 95% CIs
  ci_acme  <- boot.ci(boot_acme_obj,  type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  ci_ade   <- boot.ci(boot_ade_obj,   type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  ci_total <- boot.ci(boot_total_obj, type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  # Means
  c(
    ACME  = mean(boot_acme_obj$t),
    ACME_L = ci_acme[1], ACME_U = ci_acme[2],
    ADE   = mean(boot_ade_obj$t),
    ADE_L = ci_ade[1],  ADE_U = ci_ade[2],
    TOTAL = mean(boot_total_obj$t),
    TOTAL_L = ci_total[1], TOTAL_U = ci_total[2]
  )
}

# Run for each lung function mediator
med_names <- c("FVC_ratio_bin", "FEV1_ratio_bin", "PEF_ratio_bin")
results_list <- lapply(med_names, boot_mediation_effects)

results_df <- data.frame(
  Mediator   = med_names,
  ACME       = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ACME"]),
  ACME_Lower = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ACME_L"]),
  ACME_Upper = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ACME_U"]),
  ADE        = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ADE"]),
  ADE_Lower  = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ADE_L"]),
  ADE_Upper  = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ADE_U"]),
  Total      = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["TOTAL"]),
  Total_Lower = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["TOTAL_L"]),
  Total_Upper = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["TOTAL_U"])
)

cat("### Phlegm Mediation Results (ACME, ADE, Total Effect and 95% CI)\n")
print(
  format(
    results_df,
    digits = 3,
    nsmall = 3,
    justify = "centre"
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

```


Using PCA to combine FEV level to assess the indirect effect of the all FEV level as a mediator

```{r}
library(mediation)
library(parallel)

# 1. Prepare data and variables
lung_bin_vars <- c("FVC_ratio_bin", "FEV1_ratio_bin", "PEF_ratio_bin")
confounders <- c("Electricity", "focus_group", "indoor_outdoor_kitchen")
all_vars <- c("phlegm_binary", "Type", lung_bin_vars, confounders)
df_cc <- df2[complete.cases(df2[, all_vars]), ]  # Use df2 with your phlegm_binary

# 2. PCA on the three lung function binary variables
lung_bin_mat <- scale(df_cc[, lung_bin_vars])
pca_res_lung <- prcomp(lung_bin_mat)
df_cc$Lung_PC1 <- pca_res_lung$x[, 1]

# 3. Mediator model (linear regression)
m_lung_pc1 <- lm(
  Lung_PC1 ~ Type + Electricity + focus_group + indoor_outdoor_kitchen,
  data = df_cc
)

# 4. Outcome model (logistic regression)
y_lung_pc1 <- glm(
  phlegm_binary ~ Type + Lung_PC1 + Electricity + focus_group + indoor_outdoor_kitchen,
  data = df_cc, family = binomial
)

# 5. Mediation analysis with parallel support
n_cores <- parallel::detectCores() - 1
med_out_lung_pc1 <- mediate(
  model.m       = m_lung_pc1,
  model.y       = y_lung_pc1,
  treat         = "Type",
  mediator      = "Lung_PC1",
  control.value = "Traditional",
  treat.value   = "Improved",
  boot          = TRUE,
  sims          = 5000,
  parallel      = "multicore"
)

# 6. Summarize and print results as a table
sum_lung_pc1 <- summary(med_out_lung_pc1)
print(sum_lung_pc1)

results_pca_lung <- data.frame(
  Effect      = c("ACME (Indirect)", "ADE (Direct)", "Total Effect"),
  Estimate    = c(sum_lung_pc1$d0, sum_lung_pc1$z0, sum_lung_pc1$tau.coef),
  CI_Lower    = c(sum_lung_pc1$d0.ci[1], sum_lung_pc1$z0.ci[1], sum_lung_pc1$tau.ci[1]),
  CI_Upper    = c(sum_lung_pc1$d0.ci[2], sum_lung_pc1$z0.ci[2], sum_lung_pc1$tau.ci[2]),
  p.value     = c(sum_lung_pc1$d0.p, sum_lung_pc1$z0.p, sum_lung_pc1$tau.p)
)
print(results_pca_lung)

```











Phlegm
```{r}
# 5. Run backward‐selection on the phlegm outcome
res_LRT_locked_phlegm <- backward_selection_LRT(
  df                = df_cc_phlegm,
  outcome           = "phlegm_binary",
  predictors        = other_vars,
  locked_predictors = locked_vars,
  p_cut             = 0.20,
  family            = binomial
)

# 6. Inspect which terms were dropped
cat("\nDropped terms (phlegm):\n")
print(res_LRT_locked_phlegm$dropped)

# 7. View the final phlegm model summary
cat("\n=== Final Phlegm Model Summary ===\n")
print(summary(res_LRT_locked_phlegm$model))

# 8. Extract Odds Ratios & 95% CIs for the final model
or_phlegm <- exp(coef(res_LRT_locked_phlegm$model))
ci_phlegm <- exp(confint.default(res_LRT_locked_phlegm$model))
results_phlegm <- data.frame(
  Variable = names(or_phlegm),
  OR       = or_phlegm,
  CI_lower = ci_phlegm[,1],
  CI_upper = ci_phlegm[,2]
)
cat("\n=== Final Phlegm Model Odds Ratios & 95% CIs ===\n")
print(results_phlegm, row.names = FALSE)

```



Model:breathlessness_category 24hr level
```{r}
# 0. (Re)load df so we start fresh
# df <- read.csv(...)

# 1. Drop “Missing” in breathlessness_category
df2 <- df[df$breathlessness_category != "Missing", ]

# 2. Create a two‐level factor: No vs. Any breathlessness
df2$breathless_binary <- factor(
  ifelse(df2$breathlessness_category == "No Breathlessness",
         "No Breathlessness",
         "Any Breathlessness"),
  levels = c("No Breathlessness", "Any Breathlessness")
)

library(logistf)
library(boot)
library(parallel)

# 1. Set up
confounders <- c("Electricity", "focus_group", "indoor_outdoor_kitchen")
exposure    <- "Type"
mediators   <- c("log_PM2.5_24hr", "log_PM10_24hr", "log_PM1_24hr")
all_vars <- c("breathless_binary", exposure, mediators, confounders)
df_cc <- df2[complete.cases(df2[, all_vars]), ]
n_cores <- parallel::detectCores() - 1

# 2. General mediation function
boot_mediation_effects <- function(mediator_name, outcome_name = "breathless_binary") {
  # ACME
  boot_acme <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    beta_tm <- coef(
      lm(as.formula(paste(mediator_name, "~ Type +", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))), data = d)
    )["TypeImproved"]
    fit_y <- logistf(
      as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~ Type +", mediator_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    beta_my <- fit_y$coefficients[mediator_name]
    beta_tm * beta_my
  }
  # ADE
  boot_ade <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    fit_y <- logistf(
      as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~ Type +", mediator_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    fit_y$coefficients["TypeImproved"]
  }
  # Total
  boot_total <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    fit_y <- logistf(
      as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~ Type +", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    fit_y$coefficients["TypeImproved"]
  }
  set.seed(2025)
  boot_acme_obj  <- boot(df_cc, boot_acme,  R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  boot_ade_obj   <- boot(df_cc, boot_ade,   R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  boot_total_obj <- boot(df_cc, boot_total, R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  # 95% CIs
  ci_acme  <- boot.ci(boot_acme_obj,  type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  ci_ade   <- boot.ci(boot_ade_obj,   type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  ci_total <- boot.ci(boot_total_obj, type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  c(
    ACME  = mean(boot_acme_obj$t),
    ACME_Lower = ci_acme[1], ACME_Upper = ci_acme[2],
    ADE   = mean(boot_ade_obj$t),
    ADE_Lower = ci_ade[1],  ADE_Upper = ci_ade[2],
    Total = mean(boot_total_obj$t),
    Total_Lower = ci_total[1], Total_Upper = ci_total[2]
  )
}

# 3. Run for each mediator (**corrected to set the outcome variable explicitly**)
results_list <- lapply(mediators, function(m) boot_mediation_effects(m, outcome_name = "breathless_binary"))

# 4. Final results as a data frame (template style)
results_df <- data.frame(
  Mediator      = c("PM2.5_24hr", "PM10_24hr", "PM1_24hr"),
  ACME          = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ACME"]),
  ACME_Lower    = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ACME_Lower"]),
  ACME_Upper    = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ACME_Upper"]),
  ADE           = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ADE"]),
  ADE_Lower     = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ADE_Lower"]),
  ADE_Upper     = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ADE_Upper"]),
  Total         = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["Total"]),
  Total_Lower   = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["Total_Lower"]),
  Total_Upper   = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["Total_Upper"])
)

cat("### Breathlessness Mediation Results (ACME, ADE, Total Effect and 95% CI)\n")
print(format(results_df, digits = 3, nsmall = 3), row.names = FALSE)



```




breathlessness pca 24hr level
```{R}
library(logistf)
library(mediation)
library(parallel)

# 1. Build the PCA-based mediator PC1 from 24hr pollutant levels
poll_mat  <- scale(df_cc[, c("log_PM2.5_24hr", "log_PM10_24hr", "log_PM1_24hr")])
pca_res   <- prcomp(poll_mat)
df_cc$PM_PC1 <- pca_res$x[, 1]

# 2. Mediator model: PC1 ~ cookstove type + confounders (linear regression)
m_pc1 <- lm(
  PM_PC1 ~ Type + Electricity + focus_group + indoor_outdoor_kitchen,
  data = df_cc
)

# 3. Outcome model: Use glm for compatibility with mediate()
y_pc1 <- glm(
  breathless_binary ~ Type + PM_PC1 + Electricity + focus_group + indoor_outdoor_kitchen,
  data = df_cc,
  family = binomial
)

# 4. Causal mediation analysis with parallel support
n_cores <- parallel::detectCores() - 1
med_out_pc1 <- mediate(
  model.m       = m_pc1,
  model.y       = y_pc1,
  treat         = "Type",
  mediator      = "PM_PC1",
  control.value = "Traditional",
  treat.value   = "Improved",
  boot          = TRUE,
  sims          = 5000,
  parallel      = "multicore"
)

# 5. Summarize mediation results as a table
sum_pc1 <- summary(med_out_pc1)
print(sum_pc1)

results_pca_pc1 <- data.frame(
  Effect      = c("ACME (Indirect)", "ADE (Direct)", "Total Effect"),
  Estimate    = c(sum_pc1$d0, sum_pc1$z0, sum_pc1$tau.coef),
  CI_Lower    = c(sum_pc1$d0.ci[1], sum_pc1$z0.ci[1], sum_pc1$tau.ci[1]),
  CI_Upper    = c(sum_pc1$d0.ci[2], sum_pc1$z0.ci[2], sum_pc1$tau.ci[2]),
  p.value     = c(sum_pc1$d0.p, sum_pc1$z0.p, sum_pc1$tau.p)
)
print(results_pca_pc1)
```

breathlessness_category cooking level mediation
```{r}
# 1. Drop “Missing” in breathlessness_category
df2 <- df[df$breathlessness_category != "Missing", ]

# 2. Create a two-level factor: No vs. Any breathlessness
df2$breathless_binary <- factor(
  ifelse(df2$breathlessness_category == "No Breathlessness",
         "No Breathlessness",
         "Any Breathlessness"),
  levels = c("No Breathlessness", "Any Breathlessness")
)

# 3. Now define the variable list and subset
all_vars <- c("breathless_binary", "Type",
              "log_PM2.5_c", "log_PM10_c", "log_PM1_c",
              "Electricity", "focus_group", "indoor_outdoor_kitchen")

df_cc <- df2[complete.cases(df2[, all_vars]), ]



# 0. Prereqs
library(logistf)
library(boot)
library(parallel)

# 1. Setup variables
confounders <- c("Electricity", "focus_group", "indoor_outdoor_kitchen")
exposure    <- "Type"
mediators   <- c("log_PM2.5_c", "log_PM10_c", "log_PM1_c")   # Use "_24hr" if needed
outcome     <- "breathless_binary"  # <--- make sure to change to your outcome!

all_vars <- c(outcome, exposure, mediators, confounders)
df_cc <- df2[complete.cases(df2[, all_vars]), ]
n_cores <- parallel::detectCores() - 1

# 2. Generalized mediation function for ACME, ADE, and Total (with CIs)
boot_mediation_effects <- function(mediator_name, outcome_name = outcome) {
  # ACME (indirect)
  boot_acme <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    beta_tm <- coef(
      lm(as.formula(paste(mediator_name, "~ Type +", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))), data = d)
    )["TypeImproved"]
    fit_y <- logistf(
      as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~ Type +", mediator_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    beta_my <- fit_y$coefficients[mediator_name]
    beta_tm * beta_my
  }
  # ADE (direct)
  boot_ade <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    fit_y <- logistf(
      as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~ Type +", mediator_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    fit_y$coefficients["TypeImproved"]
  }
  # Total effect
  boot_total <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    fit_y <- logistf(
      as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~ Type +", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    fit_y$coefficients["TypeImproved"]
  }
  set.seed(2025)
  boot_acme_obj  <- boot(df_cc, boot_acme,  R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  boot_ade_obj   <- boot(df_cc, boot_ade,   R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  boot_total_obj <- boot(df_cc, boot_total, R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  # 95% CIs
  ci_acme  <- boot.ci(boot_acme_obj,  type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  ci_ade   <- boot.ci(boot_ade_obj,   type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  ci_total <- boot.ci(boot_total_obj, type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  c(
    ACME  = mean(boot_acme_obj$t),  ACME_Lower = ci_acme[1],  ACME_Upper = ci_acme[2],
    ADE   = mean(boot_ade_obj$t),   ADE_Lower  = ci_ade[1],   ADE_Upper  = ci_ade[2],
    Total = mean(boot_total_obj$t), Total_Lower = ci_total[1], Total_Upper = ci_total[2]
  )
}

# 3. Run for each mediator
results_list <- lapply(mediators, boot_mediation_effects, outcome_name = outcome)

# 4. Format results exactly like your screenshot/table
results_df <- data.frame(
  Mediator      = c("PM2.5_c", "PM10_c", "PM1_c"),
  ACME          = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ACME"]),
  ACME_Lower    = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ACME_Lower"]),
  ACME_Upper    = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ACME_Upper"]),
  ADE           = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ADE"]),
  ADE_Lower     = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ADE_Lower"]),
  ADE_Upper     = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ADE_Upper"]),
  Total         = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["Total"]),
  Total_Lower   = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["Total_Lower"]),
  Total_Upper   = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["Total_Upper"])
)

cat("### Mediation Results (ACME, ADE, Total Effect and 95% CI)\n")
print(format(results_df, digits = 3, nsmall = 3), row.names = FALSE)



```

```{r}
df_cc$PM_PC1 <- pca_res$x[, 1]

# 2. Mediator model: PC1 ~ cookstove type + confounders (linear regression)
m_pc1 <- lm(
  PM_PC1 ~ Type + Electricity + focus_group + indoor_outdoor_kitchen,
  data = df_cc
)

# 3. Outcome model: Use glm for compatibility with mediate()
y_pc1 <- glm(
  breathless_binary ~ Type + PM_PC1 + Electricity + focus_group + indoor_outdoor_kitchen,
  data = df_cc,
  family = binomial
)

# 4. Causal mediation analysis with parallel support
```

breathlessness_category FEV level mediation
```{R}
library(logistf)
library(boot)
library(parallel)

# Detect available cores, leave one for system
n_cores <- detectCores() - 1

# 1. Define confounders and exposure
confounders <- c("Electricity", "focus_group", "indoor_outdoor_kitchen")
exposure    <- "Type"

# 2. Subset to complete cases for required variables
all_vars <- c("breathless_binary", exposure,
              "FVC_ratio_bin", "FEV1_ratio_bin", "PEF_ratio_bin",
              confounders)
df_cc <- df2[complete.cases(df2[, all_vars]), ]

# 3. Unified function for a single mediator
boot_mediation_effects <- function(mediator_name, outcome_name = "breathless_binary") {
  # 1. ACME (Indirect)
  boot_acme <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    beta_tm <- coef(
      lm(as.formula(paste(mediator_name, "~ Type +", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))), data = d)
    )["TypeImproved"]
    fit_y <- logistf(
      formula = as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~ Type +", mediator_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data    = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    beta_my <- fit_y$coefficients[mediator_name]
    beta_tm * beta_my
  }
  # 2. ADE (Direct)
  boot_ade <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    fit_y <- logistf(
      formula = as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~ Type +", mediator_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data    = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    fit_y$coefficients["TypeImproved"]
  }
  # 3. Total Effect
  boot_total <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    fit_y <- logistf(
      formula = as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~ Type +", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data    = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    fit_y$coefficients["TypeImproved"]
  }
  set.seed(2025)
  # Bootstrap with parallel computing
  boot_acme_obj  <- boot(df_cc, boot_acme,  R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  boot_ade_obj   <- boot(df_cc, boot_ade,   R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  boot_total_obj <- boot(df_cc, boot_total, R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  # 95% CIs
  ci_acme  <- boot.ci(boot_acme_obj,  type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  ci_ade   <- boot.ci(boot_ade_obj,   type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  ci_total <- boot.ci(boot_total_obj, type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  # Means
  c(
    ACME  = mean(boot_acme_obj$t),
    ACME_L = ci_acme[1], ACME_U = ci_acme[2],
    ADE   = mean(boot_ade_obj$t),
    ADE_L = ci_ade[1],  ADE_U = ci_ade[2],
    TOTAL = mean(boot_total_obj$t),
    TOTAL_L = ci_total[1], TOTAL_U = ci_total[2]
  )
}

# 4. Run for each mediator
med_names <- c("FVC_ratio_bin", "FEV1_ratio_bin", "PEF_ratio_bin")
results_list <- lapply(med_names, boot_mediation_effects)

results_df <- data.frame(
  Mediator   = c("FVC_ratio_bin", "FEV1_ratio_bin", "PEF_ratio_bin"),
  ACME       = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ACME"]),
  ACME_Lower = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ACME_L"]),
  ACME_Upper = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ACME_U"]),
  ADE        = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ADE"]),
  ADE_Lower  = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ADE_L"]),
  ADE_Upper  = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["ADE_U"]),
  Total      = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["TOTAL"]),
  Total_Lower = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["TOTAL_L"]),
  Total_Upper = sapply(results_list, function(x) x["TOTAL_U"])
)

cat("### Breathlessness Mediation Results (ACME, ADE, Total Effect and 95% CI)\n")
print(
  format(
    results_df,
    digits = 3,
    nsmall = 3,
    justify = "centre"
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

```

```{r}
library(mediation)
library(parallel)

# 1. Make sure all variables exist and complete cases are used
lung_bin_vars <- c("FVC_ratio_bin", "FEV1_ratio_bin", "PEF_ratio_bin")
confounders <- c("Electricity", "focus_group", "indoor_outdoor_kitchen")

df_cc <- df2[complete.cases(df2[, all_vars]), ]

# 2. PCA on lung function indicators
lung_bin_mat <- scale(df_cc[, lung_bin_vars])
pca_res_lung <- prcomp(lung_bin_mat)
df_cc$Lung_PC1 <- pca_res_lung$x[, 1]

# 3. Mediator Model (linear regression for Lung_PC1)
m_lung_pc1 <- lm(
  Lung_PC1 ~ Type + Electricity + focus_group + indoor_outdoor_kitchen,
  data = df_cc
)

# 4. Outcome Model (logistic regression for breathless_binary)
y_lung_pc1 <- glm(
  breathless_binary ~ Type + Lung_PC1 + Electricity + focus_group + indoor_outdoor_kitchen,
  data = df_cc, family = binomial
)

# 5. Mediation Analysis with parallel computing
n_cores <- parallel::detectCores() - 1
med_out_lung_pc1 <- mediate(
  model.m       = m_lung_pc1,
  model.y       = y_lung_pc1,
  treat         = "Type",
  mediator      = "Lung_PC1",
  control.value = "Traditional",
  treat.value   = "Improved",

  sims          = 5000,
  parallel      = "multicore"
)

# 6. Summarize and tabulate results
sum_lung_pc1 <- summary(med_out_lung_pc1)
print(sum_lung_pc1)

results_pca_lung <- data.frame(
  Effect      = c("ACME (Indirect)", "ADE (Direct)", "Total Effect"),
  Estimate    = c(sum_lung_pc1$d0, sum_lung_pc1$z0, sum_lung_pc1$tau.coef),
  CI_Lower    = c(sum_lung_pc1$d0.ci[1], sum_lung_pc1$z0.ci[1], sum_lung_pc1$tau.ci[1]),
  CI_Upper    = c(sum_lung_pc1$d0.ci[2], sum_lung_pc1$z0.ci[2], sum_lung_pc1$tau.ci[2]),
  p.value     = c(sum_lung_pc1$d0.p, sum_lung_pc1$z0.p, sum_lung_pc1$tau.p)
)
print(results_pca_lung)
```

```{r}
# 2. Run backward selection on the cough outcome
res_LRT_locked_breath <- backward_selection_LRT(
  df                = df_cc,              # now the breathlessness complete‐cases df
  outcome           = "breathless_binary",
  predictors        = other_vars,
  locked_predictors = locked_vars,

# 6) Extract Odds Ratios & 95% CIs for the final model

ci_breath <- exp(confint.default(res_LRT_locked_breath$model))
results_breath <- data.frame(
  Variable = names(or_breath),
  OR       = or_breath,
  CI_lower = ci_breath[,1],
  CI_upper = ci_breath[,2]
)
cat("\n=== Final Breathlessness Model Odds Ratios & 95% CIs ===\n")
print(results_breath, row.names = FALSE)
```

IPW Cough and e value
```{r}
############################################################
# Inverse-Probability-Weighting (IPW) analysis – Cough
# Assumes raw data frame is called `df`
############################################################

# 0) Packages -------------------------------------------------
library(survey)   # svydesign, svyglm
library(cobalt)   # bal.tab, balance plots / tables
library(EValue)   # evalue calculations

# 1) Define exposure & confounders ---------------------------
exposure    <- "Type"                           # Traditional / Improved
confounders <- c("Electricity",
                 "focus_group",
                 "indoor_outdoor_kitchen")

# 2) Create binary outcome & keep complete cases -------------
df_cough <- subset(df, cough_category != "Missing")

df_cough$cough_binary <- factor(
  ifelse(df_cough$cough_category == "No Cough",
         "No Cough", "Any Cough"),
  levels = c("No Cough", "Any Cough")
)

vars_needed <- c("cough_binary", exposure, confounders)
df_cc <- df_cough[complete.cases(df_cough[, vars_needed]), ]

# 3) Propensity-score model ----------------------------------
ps_mod <- glm(Type ~ Electricity + focus_group + indoor_outdoor_kitchen,
              data   = df_cc,
              family = binomial)

df_cc$pscore <- predict(ps_mod, type = "response")

# 4) Stabilized IP weights -----------------------------------
p_treated <- mean(df_cc$Type == "Improved")   # marginal P(T=1)
p_control <- 1 - p_treated

df_cc$ipw <- ifelse(df_cc$Type == "Improved",
                    p_treated  /  df_cc$pscore,
                    p_control  / (1 - df_cc$pscore))

# 5) Balance diagnostics -------------------------------------
bal.tab(Type ~ Electricity + focus_group + indoor_outdoor_kitchen,
        data     = df_cc,
        weights  = df_cc$ipw,
        un       = TRUE,          # show unweighted & weighted
        m.threshold = 0.1)        # flag |SMD| ≥ 0.1

# 6) Weighted outcome model ----------------------------------
design_ipw <- svydesign(ids = ~1, weights = ~ipw, data = df_cc)

fit_ipw <- svyglm(cough_binary ~ Type,
                  design = design_ipw,
                  family = quasibinomial)

summary(fit_ipw)

# 7) Odds ratio & 95% CI -------------------------------------
coefs  <- summary(fit_ipw)$coefficients
logOR  <- coefs["TypeImproved", "Estimate"]
se     <- coefs["TypeImproved", "Std. Error"]

OR <- exp(logOR)
CI <- exp(logOR + c(-1, 1) * 1.96 * se)

cat(sprintf(
  "\nIPW-adjusted OR (Improved vs Traditional) = %.2f  (95%% CI %.2f–%.2f)\n",
  OR, CI[1], CI[2]))

# 8) E-value --------------------------------------------------
evalues.OR(est = OR, lo = CI[1], hi = CI[2], true = 1, rare = FALSE)

# 9) Diagnostics: PS overlap & weight distribution -----------
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))  # side-by-side plots

plot(density(df_cc$pscore[df_cc$Type == "Traditional"]),
     main = "Propensity-score overlap",
     xlab = "Propensity score",
     ylim = c(0, max(density(df_cc$pscore)$y)))
lines(density(df_cc$pscore[df_cc$Type == "Improved"]), col = 2)
legend("topright", c("Traditional", "Improved"), col = c(1, 2), lty = 1)

hist(df_cc$ipw, breaks = 20,
     main = "IPW weight distribution",
     xlab = "Stabilized weight")

par(mfrow = c(1, 1))  # reset plotting layout

# 10) Optional: effective sample size ------------------------
bt <- bal.tab(Type ~ Electricity + focus_group + indoor_outdoor_kitchen,
              data = df_cc, weights = df_cc$ipw)
bt$ess          # ESS by group
############################################################

```




Wheezing IPW and E value
```{r}
# --- FIXED COMPLETE IPW & E-VALUE ANALYSIS FOR WHEEZING ---

library(survey)
library(cobalt)
library(EValue)

confounders <- c("Electricity", "focus_group", "indoor_outdoor_kitchen")
exposure    <- "Type"
lung_bins   <- c("FVC_ratio_bin", "FEV1_ratio_bin", "PEF_ratio_bin")
vars_wh     <- c("Wheezing", exposure, lung_bins, confounders)

# 1. Keep complete cases FIRST
df_wh <- df[complete.cases(df[, vars_wh]), ]

# 2. Recode Wheezing intelligently
#   • If numeric 0/1  → factor("No","Yes")
#   • If character "0"/"1" → same
#   • Else leave as-is
if (is.numeric(df_wh$Wheezing) || all(trimws(df_wh$Wheezing) %in% c("0","1"))) {
  df_wh$Wheezing <- factor(as.numeric(df_wh$Wheezing),
                           levels = c(0,1),
                           labels = c("No","Yes"))
} else {
  df_wh$Wheezing <- factor(trimws(df_wh$Wheezing),
                           levels = c("No","Yes"))
}

# Drop any remaining NA rows created by coercion
df_wh <- df_wh[!is.na(df_wh$Wheezing), ]

# Double-check both levels exist
tabW <- table(df_wh$Wheezing)
if (any(tabW == 0)) stop(
  sprintf("Still only one Wheezing level after recode: %s", paste(names(tabW)[tabW==0], collapse=","))
)

# 3. Ensure Type factor order
df_wh$Type <- factor(df_wh$Type, levels = c("Traditional","Improved"))

# 4. Propensity score
ps_wh <- glm(Type ~ Electricity + focus_group + indoor_outdoor_kitchen,
             data = df_wh, family = binomial)
df_wh$pscore <- predict(ps_wh, type = "response")

# 5. Stabilised IP weights
p_t <- mean(df_wh$Type=="Improved"); p_c <- 1-p_t
df_wh$ipw <- ifelse(df_wh$Type=="Improved", p_t/df_wh$pscore, p_c/(1-df_wh$pscore))

# 6. (Optional) balance
bal.tab(Type ~ Electricity + focus_group + indoor_outdoor_kitchen,
        data = df_wh, weights = df_wh$ipw)

# 7. Survey-weighted model
design_wh <- svydesign(ids=~1, weights=~ipw, data=df_wh)
fit_wh <- svyglm(Wheezing ~ Type, design = design_wh, family = quasibinomial)
print(summary(fit_wh))

# 8. OR & CI
coef_wh <- summary(fit_wh)$coefficients
logOR <- coef_wh["TypeImproved","Estimate"];  se <- coef_wh["TypeImproved","Std. Error"]
OR  <- exp(logOR)
CI  <- exp(c(logOR - 1.96*se, logOR + 1.96*se))
pval <- coef_wh["TypeImproved","Pr(>|t|)"]
cat(sprintf("\nIPW-adjusted OR = %.2f  (95%% CI %.2f–%.2f), p = %.3f\n",
            OR, CI[1], CI[2], pval))

# 9. E-value
evalues.OR(est = OR, lo = CI[1], hi = CI[2], true = 1, rare = TRUE)  # rare=FALSE if outcome common


# PS density plot by group
plot(density(df_wh$pscore[df_wh$Type=="Traditional"]),
     main="PS Overlap: Traditional vs Improved", xlab="Propensity Score")
lines(density(df_wh$pscore[df_wh$Type=="Improved"]), col="red")
legend("topright", legend=c("Trad","Imp"), col=c("black","red"), lty=1)


bt <- bal.tab(Type ~ Electricity + focus_group + indoor_outdoor_kitchen,
              data=df_wh, weights=df_wh$ipw)
print(bt)  


summary(df_wh$ipw)
hist(df_wh$ipw, breaks=20, main="IPW Distribution")
ess <- bt$es.mean; print(ess)


```




Phlegm IPW and e value
```{r}
# --- COMPLETE IPW & E-VALUE ANALYSIS FOR PHLEGM ---

library(survey)
library(cobalt)
library(EValue)

# 1. Confounders/exposure setup
confounders <- c("Electricity", "focus_group", "indoor_outdoor_kitchen")
exposure    <- "Type"

# 2. Filter & create outcome
df_phlegm <- df[df$phlegm_category != "Missing", ]
df_phlegm$phlegm_binary <- factor(
  ifelse(df_phlegm$phlegm_category == "No Phlegm", "No Phlegm", "Any Phlegm"),
  levels = c("No Phlegm", "Any Phlegm")
)

# 3. Complete-case subset
vars_phlegm <- c("phlegm_binary", exposure, confounders)
df_cc_phlegm <- df_phlegm[complete.cases(df_phlegm[, vars_phlegm]), ]

cat("Number of rows after filtering:", nrow(df_cc_phlegm), "\n")
cat("Traditional n =", sum(df_cc_phlegm$Type == "Traditional"),
    "Improved n =", sum(df_cc_phlegm$Type == "Improved"), "\n")
cat("No Phlegm =", sum(df_cc_phlegm$phlegm_binary == "No Phlegm"),
    "Any Phlegm =", sum(df_cc_phlegm$phlegm_binary == "Any Phlegm"), "\n")

# 4. Propensity score model
ps_phlegm <- glm(Type ~ Electricity + focus_group + indoor_outdoor_kitchen,
                 data = df_cc_phlegm, family = binomial)
df_cc_phlegm$pscore <- predict(ps_phlegm, type = "response")

# 5. Calculate stabilized IP weights
p_treated <- mean(df_cc_phlegm$Type == "Improved")
p_control <- mean(df_cc_phlegm$Type == "Traditional")
df_cc_phlegm$ipw <- ifelse(
  df_cc_phlegm$Type == "Improved",
  p_treated / df_cc_phlegm$pscore,
  p_control / (1 - df_cc_phlegm$pscore)
)

# 6. Covariate balance diagnostics
bal_phlegm <- bal.tab(
  Type ~ Electricity + focus_group + indoor_outdoor_kitchen,
  data    = df_cc_phlegm,
  weights = df_cc_phlegm$ipw
)
print(bal_phlegm)

# 7. Weighted survey design and model
design_phlegm <- svydesign(ids = ~1, weights = ~ipw, data = df_cc_phlegm)
fit_phlegm    <- svyglm(phlegm_binary ~ Type,
                        design = design_phlegm,
                        family = quasibinomial)
print(summary(fit_phlegm))

# 8. Extract OR, CI, and p-value
coefs      <- summary(fit_phlegm)$coefficients
logOR_p    <- coefs["TypeImproved", "Estimate"]
se_p       <- coefs["TypeImproved", "Std. Error"]
OR_p       <- exp(logOR_p)
CI_p       <- exp(c(logOR_p - 1.96*se_p, logOR_p + 1.96*se_p))
pval_p     <- coefs["TypeImproved", "Pr(>|t|)"]
cat(sprintf("\nIPW-adjusted OR = %.2f  (95%% CI %.2f–%.2f), p = %.3f\n",
            OR_p, CI_p[1], CI_p[2], pval_p))

# 9. E-value
cat("\nE-value for phlegm OR:\n")
evalues.OR(est = OR_p, lo = CI_p[1], hi = CI_p[2], true = 1, rare = TRUE)

# 10. Diagnostics plots
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))  # Show two plots side-by-side

# 10a. PS overlap by group
plot(
  density(df_cc_phlegm$pscore[df_cc_phlegm$Type == "Traditional"]),
  main = "PS Overlap: Traditional vs Improved (Phlegm)",
  xlab = "Propensity Score", lwd = 2
)
lines(
  density(df_cc_phlegm$pscore[df_cc_phlegm$Type == "Improved"]),
  col = "red", lwd = 2
)
legend("topright", legend = c("Trad","Imp"), col = c("black","red"), lty = 1, lwd = 2)

# 10b. IPW distribution
hist(
  df_cc_phlegm$ipw,
  breaks = 20,
  main   = "IPW Distribution (Phlegm)",
  xlab   = "IPW",
  col    = "lightgray"
)
par(mfrow = c(1,1))

# 11. Effective sample sizes (Unadjusted, Adjusted if available)
cat("\nUnadjusted sample sizes:\n")
print(table(df_cc_phlegm$Type))
if (!is.null(bal_phlegm$Effective.Sample.Size)) {
  cat("\nAdjusted effective sample sizes:\n")
  print(bal_phlegm$Effective.Sample.Size)
} else if (!is.null(bal_phlegm$es.weights)) {
  cat("\nAdjusted effective sample sizes (es.weights):\n")
  print(bal_phlegm$es.weights)
} else {
  cat("\nAdjusted effective sample sizes not available from bal.tab object.\n")
}

# ---- END OF PHLEGM IPW + E-VALUE ANALYSIS ----


```


breathless_binary IPW
```{r}
# --- COMPLETE IPW & E-VALUE ANALYSIS FOR BREATHLESSNESS ---

library(survey)
library(cobalt)
library(EValue)

# 1. Filter & create outcome variable
df_breath <- df[df$breathlessness_category != "Missing", ]
df_breath$breathless_binary <- factor(
  ifelse(df_breath$breathlessness_category == "No Breathlessness",
         "No Breathlessness", "Any Breathlessness"),
  levels = c("No Breathlessness", "Any Breathlessness")
)

# 2. Only keep complete cases for analysis
confounders <- c("Electricity", "focus_group", "indoor_outdoor_kitchen")
exposure    <- "Type"
vars_breath <- c("breathless_binary", exposure, confounders)
df_cc_breath <- df_breath[complete.cases(df_breath[, vars_breath]), ]

cat("Number of rows after filtering:", nrow(df_cc_breath), "\n")
cat("Traditional n =", sum(df_cc_breath$Type == "Traditional"),
    "Improved n =", sum(df_cc_breath$Type == "Improved"), "\n")
cat("No Breathlessness =", sum(df_cc_breath$breathless_binary == "No Breathlessness"),
    "Any Breathlessness =", sum(df_cc_breath$breathless_binary == "Any Breathlessness"), "\n")

# 3. Estimate propensity score (PS)
ps_breath <- glm(Type ~ Electricity + focus_group + indoor_outdoor_kitchen,
                 data = df_cc_breath, family = binomial)
df_cc_breath$pscore <- predict(ps_breath, type = "response")

# 4. Calculate stabilized IP weights
p_treated <- mean(df_cc_breath$Type == "Improved")
p_control <- mean(df_cc_breath$Type == "Traditional")
df_cc_breath$ipw <- ifelse(
  df_cc_breath$Type == "Improved",
  p_treated / df_cc_breath$pscore,
  p_control / (1 - df_cc_breath$pscore)
)

# 5. Balance diagnostics (optional)
bal_breath <- bal.tab(
  Type ~ Electricity + focus_group + indoor_outdoor_kitchen,
  data    = df_cc_breath,
  weights = df_cc_breath$ipw
)
print(bal_breath)

# 6. Survey design and IPW‐weighted logistic regression
design_breath <- svydesign(ids = ~1, weights = ~ipw, data = df_cc_breath)
fit_breath    <- svyglm(breathless_binary ~ Type,
                        design = design_breath,
                        family = quasibinomial)
print(summary(fit_breath))

# 7. Extract OR, 95% CI, and p-value
coefs      <- summary(fit_breath)$coefficients
logOR_b    <- coefs["TypeImproved", "Estimate"]
se_b       <- coefs["TypeImproved", "Std. Error"]
OR_b       <- exp(logOR_b)
CI_b       <- exp(c(logOR_b - 1.96*se_b, logOR_b + 1.96*se_b))
pval_b     <- coefs["TypeImproved", "Pr(>|t|)"]
cat(sprintf("\nIPW-adjusted OR = %.2f  (95%% CI %.2f–%.2f), p = %.3f\n",
            OR_b, CI_b[1], CI_b[2], pval_b))

# 8. Calculate E-value
cat("\nE-value for breathlessness OR:\n")
evalues.OR(est = OR_b, lo = CI_b[1], hi = CI_b[2], true = 1, rare = TRUE)

# 9. Diagnostics plots (optional)
par(mfrow = c(1,2))
# 9a. PS overlap by group
plot(
  density(df_cc_breath$pscore[df_cc_breath$Type == "Traditional"]),
  main = "PS Overlap: Traditional vs Improved (Breathless)",
  xlab = "Propensity Score", lwd = 2
)
lines(
  density(df_cc_breath$pscore[df_cc_breath$Type == "Improved"]),
  col = "red", lwd = 2
)
legend("topright", legend = c("Trad","Imp"), col = c("black","red"), lty = 1, lwd = 2)

# 9b. IPW distribution
hist(
  df_cc_breath$ipw,
  breaks = 20,
  main   = "IPW Distribution (Breathless)",
  xlab   = "IPW",
  col    = "lightgray"
)
par(mfrow = c(1,1))

# 10. Effective sample sizes (informative)
print(table(df_cc_breath$Type))
cat("\nUnadjusted n:", sum(df_cc_breath$Type == "Traditional"), "(Traditional),",
    sum(df_cc_breath$Type == "Improved"), "(Improved)\n")
cat("Adjusted effective sample sizes not available from bal.tab object.\n")

```

Pollutant Outcome Multivariate Regression
```{r}
backward_selection_lm <- function(
  df,
  outcome,
  predictors,
  locked_predictors = NULL,
  p_cut = 0.20
) {
  # 1) Validate and separate predictors into locked and selectable
  if (!is.null(locked_predictors)) {
    locked_predictors <- locked_predictors[nzchar(locked_predictors) & locked_predictors %in% names(df)]
    if (any(!locked_predictors %in% predictors)) {
      message("Warning: Some specified locked_predictors were not in the initial 'predictors' list. Adding them.")
      predictors <- unique(c(predictors, locked_predictors))
    }
  } else {
    locked_predictors <- character(0)
  }

  initial_all_predictors <- predictors[nzchar(predictors) & predictors %in% names(df)]
  selectable_predictors_initial <- setdiff(initial_all_predictors, locked_predictors)

  if (length(initial_all_predictors) == 0 && length(locked_predictors) == 0) {
      stop("No valid predictors (locked or selectable) provided or found in data frame.")
  }

  current_selectable_predictors <- selectable_predictors_initial
  dropped_terms <- character()

  cat("--- Starting Backward Selection for lm() using F-test ---\n")

  repeat {
    # Combine locked and current selectable predictors
    current_all_predictors <- c(locked_predictors, current_selectable_predictors)

    # 2) Build the current formula
    if (length(current_all_predictors) == 0) {
      form <- as.formula(paste(outcome, "~ 1"))
    } else {
      form <- as.formula(paste(outcome, "~", paste(current_all_predictors, collapse = " + ")))
    }

    # 3) Fit the linear model
    fit <- tryCatch(
      lm(form, data = df),
      error = function(e) {
        message("Warning: Model failed to fit during selection step: ", e$message, ". Stopping backward selection.")
        return(NULL)
      }
    )

    if (is.null(fit)) {
        break
    }

    # If only locked predictors or no selectable predictors left, stop
    if (length(current_selectable_predictors) == 0) {
        cat("No selectable predictors left to drop.\n")
        break
    }

    # 4) Compute drop1 F-test table
    pvals_col_name <- "Pr(>F)"
    
    d1_full <- tryCatch(
      drop1(fit, test = "F"),
      error = function(e) {
        message("Error in drop1() with test='F': ", e$message)
        return(NULL)
      }
    )

    if (is.null(d1_full) || nrow(d1_full) <= 1) {
        if (length(current_selectable_predictors) > 0) {
            message("Warning: drop1() output is empty or only contains intercept. Stopping.")
        }
        break
    }

    # Filter out intercept and locked predictors from drop1 output
    d1 <- d1_full[rownames(d1_full) %in% current_selectable_predictors, , drop = FALSE]

    if (nrow(d1) == 0) {
        cat("No selectable predictors with drop1 information remaining.\n")
        break
    }

    pvals <- d1[[pvals_col_name]]
    if (is.null(pvals)) {
      message("Warning: P-value column '", pvals_col_name, "' not found. Stopping backward selection.")
      break
    }
    names(pvals) <- rownames(d1)

    # 5) Stop if all selectable p-values are less than or equal to cutoff
    if (all(is.na(pvals)) || max(pvals, na.rm = TRUE) <= p_cut) {
        break
    }

    # 6) Otherwise, drop the selectable term with the largest p-value
    worst_term <- names(which.max(pvals))
    worst_p    <- pvals[worst_term]

    cat(sprintf("Dropping: %-20s (F-test p = %.3f)\n", worst_term, worst_p))
    dropped_terms <- c(dropped_terms, worst_term)
    current_selectable_predictors <- setdiff(current_selectable_predictors, worst_term)
  }

  # 7) Report dropped terms & final model refit
  cat("\nTerms dropped (F-test p >", p_cut, "):\n")
  if (length(dropped_terms) == 0) {
    cat("  None\n")
  } else {
    print(dropped_terms)
  }
  
  cat("\nTerms locked and always kept:\n")
  if (length(locked_predictors) == 0) {
    cat("  None\n")
  } else {
    print(locked_predictors)
  }

  final_all_predictors <- c(locked_predictors, current_selectable_predictors)

  if (length(final_all_predictors) == 0) {
    final_formula <- paste(outcome, "~ 1")
  } else {
    final_formula <- paste(outcome, "~", paste(final_all_predictors, collapse = " + "))
  }
  cat("\nFinal model formula:\n ", final_formula, "\n\n")

  # Final fit of the selected model
  final_fit <- lm(as.formula(final_formula), data = df)

  return(list(
    model = final_fit,
    dropped = dropped_terms,
    locked = locked_predictors,
    formula = final_formula
  ))
}
```

```{r}
  p_cut             = 0.20
)
summary(log_PM10_c_result$model)
```

Mediation Part 2
Mediation Analysis (Pollutant to cookstove to Wheezing)
24hr level (exposure) to cookstove (mediator) to Wheezing (outcome )
```{r}
library(logistf)
library(boot)
library(parallel)

# Confounders
confounders <- c("Electricity", "focus_group", "indoor_outdoor_kitchen")
pollutants  <- c(
  "log_PM10_24hr",
  "log_PM2.5_24hr",
  "log_PM1_24hr",
  "log_CO_24hr",
  "log_PM10_c",
  "log_PM2.5_c",
  "log_PM1_c",
  "log_BC_c",
  "log_CO_c"
)
mediator    <- "Type"
outcome     <- "Wheezing"
all_vars    <- c(outcome, mediator, pollutants, confounders)

# Complete cases
df_cc <- df[complete.cases(df[, all_vars]), ]

n_cores <- parallel::detectCores() - 1

boot_mediation_effects_flipped <- function(exposure_name, outcome_name = outcome) {
  # ACME (Indirect via Cookstove)
  boot_acme <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    # Mediator model: Type ~ Pollutant + confounders
    # Note: if Type is categorical/factor, use numeric coding or logistic model
    beta_em <- coef(
      glm(as.formula(paste(mediator, "~", exposure_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
          data = d, family = binomial)
    )[exposure_name]
    # Outcome model: Wheezing ~ Type + Pollutant + confounders
    fit_y <- logistf(
      formula = as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~", mediator, "+", exposure_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    beta_me_y <- fit_y$coefficients[paste0(mediator, "Improved")] # Adjust this if coding differs
    beta_em * beta_me_y
  }
  # ADE (Direct effect of pollutant)
  boot_ade <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    fit_y <- logistf(
      formula = as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~", mediator, "+", exposure_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    fit_y$coefficients[exposure_name]
  }
  # Total effect of pollutant (no mediator)
  boot_total <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    fit_y <- logistf(
      formula = as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~", exposure_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    fit_y$coefficients[exposure_name]
  }
  set.seed(2025)
  boot_acme_obj  <- boot(df_cc, boot_acme,  R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  boot_ade_obj   <- boot(df_cc, boot_ade,   R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  boot_total_obj <- boot(df_cc, boot_total, R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  ci_acme  <- boot.ci(boot_acme_obj,  type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  ci_ade   <- boot.ci(boot_ade_obj,   type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  ci_total <- boot.ci(boot_total_obj, type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  c(
    ACME  = mean(boot_acme_obj$t),
    ACME_L = ci_acme[1], ACME_U = ci_acme[2],
    ADE   = mean(boot_ade_obj$t),
    ADE_L = ci_ade[1],  ADE_U = ci_ade[2],
    TOTAL = mean(boot_total_obj$t),
    TOTAL_L = ci_total[1], TOTAL_U = ci_total[2]
  )
}

# Run mediation analysis for each pollutant
results_list_flipped <- lapply(pollutants, boot_mediation_effects_flipped)

results_df_flipped <- data.frame(
  Exposure    = pollutants,
  ACME        = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["ACME"]),
  ACME_Lower  = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["ACME_L"]),
  ACME_Upper  = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["ACME_U"]),
  ADE         = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["ADE"]),
  ADE_Lower   = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["ADE_L"]),
  ADE_Upper   = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["ADE_U"]),
  Total       = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["TOTAL"]),
  Total_Lower = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["TOTAL_L"]),
  Total_Upper = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["TOTAL_U"])
)

cat("### Mediation Results (Exposure = Pollutant, Mediator = Cookstove)\n")
print(
  format(
    results_df_flipped,
    digits = 3,
    nsmall = 3,
    justify = "centre"
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)


```




Pollutant to cookstove to cough
```{r}
library(logistf)
library(boot)
library(parallel)

# 1. Keep only real categories (drop “Missing”)
df_cc2 <- df[df$cough_category != "Missing", ]

# 2. Make a binary cough variable
df_cc2$cough_binary <- factor(
  ifelse(df_cc2$cough_category == "No Cough",
         "No Cough",
         "Any Cough"),
  levels = c("No Cough", "Any Cough")
)

# Confounders
confounders <- c("Electricity", "focus_group", "indoor_outdoor_kitchen")
pollutants  <- c(
  "log_PM10_24hr",
  "log_PM2.5_24hr",
  "log_PM1_24hr",
  "log_CO_24hr",
  "log_PM10_c",
  "log_PM2.5_c",
  "log_PM1_c",
  "log_BC_c",
  "log_CO_c"
)
mediator    <- "Type"
outcome     <- "cough_binary"
all_vars    <- unique(c(outcome, mediator, pollutants, confounders))

# Complete cases
df_cc <- df_cc2[complete.cases(df_cc2[, all_vars]), ]

n_cores <- parallel::detectCores() - 1

boot_mediation_effects_flipped <- function(exposure_name, outcome_name = outcome) {
  # ACME (Indirect via Cookstove)
  boot_acme <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    # Mediator model: Type ~ Pollutant + confounders
    beta_em <- coef(
      glm(as.formula(paste(mediator, "~", exposure_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
          data = d, family = binomial)
    )[exposure_name]
    # Outcome model: cough_binary ~ Type + Pollutant + confounders
    fit_y <- logistf(
      formula = as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~", mediator, "+", exposure_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    beta_me_y <- fit_y$coefficients["TypeImproved"]
    beta_em * beta_me_y
  }
  # ADE (Direct effect of pollutant)
  boot_ade <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    fit_y <- logistf(
      formula = as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~", mediator, "+", exposure_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    fit_y$coefficients[exposure_name]
  }
  # Total effect of pollutant (no mediator)
  boot_total <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    fit_y <- logistf(
      formula = as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~", exposure_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    fit_y$coefficients[exposure_name]
  }
  set.seed(2025)
  boot_acme_obj  <- boot(df_cc, boot_acme,  R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  boot_ade_obj   <- boot(df_cc, boot_ade,   R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  boot_total_obj <- boot(df_cc, boot_total, R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  ci_acme  <- boot.ci(boot_acme_obj,  type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  ci_ade   <- boot.ci(boot_ade_obj,   type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  ci_total <- boot.ci(boot_total_obj, type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  c(
    ACME  = mean(boot_acme_obj$t),
    ACME_L = ci_acme[1], ACME_U = ci_acme[2],
    ADE   = mean(boot_ade_obj$t),
    ADE_L = ci_ade[1],  ADE_U = ci_ade[2],
    TOTAL = mean(boot_total_obj$t),
    TOTAL_L = ci_total[1], TOTAL_U = ci_total[2]
  )
}

# Run mediation analysis for each unique pollutant as the exposure
results_list_flipped <- lapply(pollutants, boot_mediation_effects_flipped)

results_df_flipped <- data.frame(
  Exposure    = pollutants,
  ACME        = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["ACME"]),
  ACME_Lower  = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["ACME_L"]),
  ACME_Upper  = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["ACME_U"]),
  ADE         = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["ADE"]),
  ADE_Lower   = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["ADE_L"]),
  ADE_Upper   = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["ADE_U"]),
  Total       = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["TOTAL"]),
  Total_Lower = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["TOTAL_L"]),
  Total_Upper = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["TOTAL_U"])
)

cat("### Mediation Results (Exposure = Pollutant, Mediator = Cookstove, Outcome = cough_binary)\n")
print(
  format(
    results_df_flipped,
    digits = 3,
    nsmall = 3,
    justify = "centre"
  ),
  row.names = FALSE
)

  

```

```{r}
library(logistf)

# Confounders and exposures

pollutants  <- c(
  "log_PM10_24hr",

outcome     <- "phlegm_binary"

# Complete cases
df_cc <- df2[complete.cases(df2[, all_vars]), ]

n_cores <- parallel::detectCores() - 1

boot_mediation_effects_flipped <- function(exposure_name, outcome_name = outcome) {
  # ACME (Indirect via Cookstove)
  boot_acme <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    # Mediator model: Type ~ Pollutant + confounders
    beta_em <- coef(
      glm(as.formula(paste(mediator, "~", exposure_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
          data = d, family = binomial)
    )[exposure_name]
    # Outcome model: phlegm_binary ~ Type + Pollutant + confounders
    fit_y <- logistf(
      formula = as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~", mediator, "+", exposure_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    beta_me_y <- fit_y$coefficients["TypeImproved"]
    beta_em * beta_me_y
  }
  # ADE (Direct effect of pollutant)
  boot_ade <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    fit_y <- logistf(
      formula = as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~", mediator, "+", exposure_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    fit_y$coefficients[exposure_name]
  }
  # Total effect of pollutant (no mediator)
  boot_total <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    fit_y <- logistf(
      formula = as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~", exposure_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    fit_y$coefficients[exposure_name]
  }
  set.seed(2025)
  boot_acme_obj  <- boot(df_cc, boot_acme,  R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  boot_ade_obj   <- boot(df_cc, boot_ade,   R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  boot_total_obj <- boot(df_cc, boot_total, R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  ci_acme  <- boot.ci(boot_acme_obj,  type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  ci_ade   <- boot.ci(boot_ade_obj,   type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  ci_total <- boot.ci(boot_total_obj, type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  c(
    ACME  = mean(boot_acme_obj$t),
    ACME_L = ci_acme[1], ACME_U = ci_acme[2],
    ADE   = mean(boot_ade_obj$t),
    ADE_L = ci_ade[1],  ADE_U = ci_ade[2],
    TOTAL = mean(boot_total_obj$t),
    TOTAL_L = ci_total[1], TOTAL_U = ci_total[2]
  )
}

# Run mediation analysis for each unique pollutant as the exposure
results_list_flipped <- lapply(pollutants, boot_mediation_effects_flipped)

results_df_flipped <- data.frame(
  Exposure    = pollutants,
  ACME        = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["ACME"]),

)
```

Pollutant to Cookstove to Breathlessness

```{r}
library(logistf)
library(boot)
library(parallel)

# 1. Drop “Missing” in breathlessness_category
df2 <- df[df$breathlessness_category != "Missing", ]

# 2. Create a two‐level factor: No vs. Any breathlessness
df2$breathless_binary <- factor(
  ifelse(df2$breathlessness_category == "No Breathlessness",
         "No Breathlessness",
         "Any Breathlessness"),
  levels = c("No Breathlessness", "Any Breathlessness")
)

# Confounders and exposures
confounders <- c("Electricity", "focus_group", "indoor_outdoor_kitchen")
pollutants  <- c(
  "log_PM10_24hr",
  "log_PM2.5_24hr",
  "log_PM1_24hr",
  "log_CO_24hr",
  "log_PM10_c",
  "log_PM2.5_c",
  "log_PM1_c",
  "log_BC_c",
  "log_CO_c"
)
mediator    <- "Type"
outcome     <- "breathless_binary"
all_vars    <- unique(c(outcome, mediator, pollutants, confounders))

# Complete cases
df_cc <- df2[complete.cases(df2[, all_vars]), ]

n_cores <- parallel::detectCores() - 1

boot_mediation_effects_flipped <- function(exposure_name, outcome_name = outcome) {
  # ACME (Indirect via Cookstove)
  boot_acme <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    # Mediator model: Type ~ Pollutant + confounders
    beta_em <- coef(
      glm(as.formula(paste(mediator, "~", exposure_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
          data = d, family = binomial)
    )[exposure_name]
    # Outcome model: breathless_binary ~ Type + Pollutant + confounders
    fit_y <- logistf(
      formula = as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~", mediator, "+", exposure_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    beta_me_y <- fit_y$coefficients["TypeImproved"]
    beta_em * beta_me_y
  }
  # ADE (Direct effect of pollutant)
  boot_ade <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    fit_y <- logistf(
      formula = as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~", mediator, "+", exposure_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    fit_y$coefficients[exposure_name]
  }
  # Total effect of pollutant (no mediator)
  boot_total <- function(data, inds) {
    d <- data[inds, ]
    fit_y <- logistf(
      formula = as.formula(paste(outcome_name, "~", exposure_name, "+", paste(confounders, collapse = " + "))),
      data = d,
      control = logistf.control(maxit = 200, maxstep = 100),
      plcontrol = logistpl.control(maxit = 200)
    )
    fit_y$coefficients[exposure_name]
  }
  set.seed(2025)
  boot_acme_obj  <- boot(df_cc, boot_acme,  R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  boot_ade_obj   <- boot(df_cc, boot_ade,   R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  boot_total_obj <- boot(df_cc, boot_total, R = 5000, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = n_cores)
  ci_acme  <- boot.ci(boot_acme_obj,  type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  ci_ade   <- boot.ci(boot_ade_obj,   type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  ci_total <- boot.ci(boot_total_obj, type = "perc")$percent[4:5]
  c(
    ACME  = mean(boot_acme_obj$t),
    ACME_Lower = ci_acme[1], ACME_Upper = ci_acme[2],
    ADE   = mean(boot_ade_obj$t),
    ADE_Lower = ci_ade[1],  ADE_Upper = ci_ade[2],
    Total = mean(boot_total_obj$t),
    Total_Lower = ci_total[1], Total_Upper = ci_total[2]
  )
}

# Run for each pollutant as exposure (flipped mediation)
results_list_flipped <- lapply(pollutants, boot_mediation_effects_flipped)

results_df_flipped <- data.frame(
  Exposure      = pollutants,
  ACME          = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["ACME"]),
  ACME_Lower    = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["ACME_Lower"]),
  ACME_Upper    = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["ACME_Upper"]),
  ADE           = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["ADE"]),
  ADE_Lower     = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["ADE_Lower"]),
  ADE_Upper     = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["ADE_Upper"]),
  Total         = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["Total"]),
  Total_Lower   = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["Total_Lower"]),
  Total_Upper   = sapply(results_list_flipped, function(x) x["Total_Upper"])
)

cat("### Mediation Results (Exposure = Pollutant, Mediator = Cookstove, Outcome = breathless_binary)\n")
print(format(results_df_flipped, digits = 3, nsmall = 3), row.names = FALSE)
```
